name: Get a book from Book Detail View and Return from Books in LYRASIS
fullName: My books module: Get a book from Book Detail View and Return from Books in LYRASIS
statusMessage: 'Dolphin Junction: Stories' book with specific action button is not present on books screen

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Bibliotheca' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
When  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
And  I close Book Details for IOSTab
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'Dolphin Junction: Stories' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'Dolphin Junction: Stories' book with specific action button is not present on books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BooksSteps.isBookPresent(BooksSteps.java:93)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/MyBooks.feature:62)

steps.name: When  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click RETURN action button on book details screen
And  I close Book Details for IOSTab
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is not present on books screen
